title: Property Consultant - CBRE India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - CBRE India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? CBRE India in Chandigarh offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About CBRE India:
CBRE India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CBRE India!
